signals.headline: CAVALIERS TAKE 2-0 SERIES LEAD OVER RAPTORS IN FIRST ROUND PLAYOFFS | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
CAVALIERS TAKE 2-0 SERIES LEAD OVER RAPTORS IN FIRST ROUND PLAYOFFS | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Toronto Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, securing a 2-0 series lead in their first-round matchup[1][3]. Harden, Mitchell, and Mobley combined for 83 of the Cavaliers' 115 points[1]. Game 3 is scheduled for Thursday at 8:00 PM[1].

This development significantly impacts play
